system.flavor: A distant glint in the heavens, portents of the devastation to come.
system.effect:
Zone your turn and call a meteor onto the battlefield that begins its descent. You may have any number of these zones active. The first time in a round a character enters one of these zones, roll the effect die. If you roll equal to or under the round number, a meteor lands in the space, branding that character and creating a cross 1 explosion centered on them for 1d6+4 damage (save for half). Then remove the zone.
Isolate becomes piercing.
